name: cortex-frontend
description: Cortex frontend — local-first second-brain web client (React + Vite).

scripts.fonts:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('src/assets/fonts',{recursive:true});for(const w of [400,500,600,700])fs.copyFileSync(`node_modules/@fontsource/geist-sans/files/geist-sans-latin-${w}-normal.woff2`,`src/assets/fonts/geist-sans-${w}.woff2`);for(const w of [400,500,600])fs.copyFileSync(`node_modules/@fontsource/geist-mono/files/geist-mono-latin-${w}-normal.woff2`,`src/assets/fonts/geist-mono-${w}.woff2`);console.log('copied 7 Geist woff2 to src/assets/fonts');"
